setupSubtitle: Let's set up your profile to personalize your daily water goal.
dailyGoalDisclaimerContent: We've set your daily goal to a maximum of {suggestedAmount} to keep things within our recommended range. For personalized advice, feel free to consult a healthcare professional.
setupError: Oops. An error occurred while saving your informations.
ageInputRequirement: You must be between {minAge} and {maxAge} years old
dataPrivacy: Your data never leaves your device.
inputRequirement: Please, enter a value between {minValue} and {maxValue}
emptyHistorySubtitle: It looks like you haven't tracked any water today. Ready to start?
oldAppDataFound: We found app data from a previous version. Do you want to migrate your entire history and cups?
migrationWarning: Your data will be backed up, but you may still lose it during this process. The migration will only happen once.
futureMigrationWarning: You will not be able to migrate your data in the future.
scratchButton: I want to start from scratch
timeNeeded: Don't worry, it may take some time.
migrationSuccess: Your data has been migrated. Enjoy, and welcome again!
migrationError: An error happened during the migration. Feel free to report the error below on the project's repository.
migrationErrorRetry: This isn't guaranteed to work. If it doesn't work again, you can report the error and wait for a fix. Your data will not be lost.
exportDesc: Backup your days, history, and cups
importDesc: Restore your days, history, and cups
exportSuccessful: All set! Your hydration history is safe.
importDatabaseUnsupported: The backup's database version is different
importInvalidJson: The JSON file is probably invalid
notificationPermissionRequest: To help you stay hydrated, we need your permission to send notifications. We'll only notify you at the times you've chosen.
hydrationHint: Staying hydrated during your active hours improves focus and energy levels.
notificationBody: Keep your hydration habit going. Log your latest glass!
